overview: Based on the published agenda, the Wausau School District Board of Education's May 11, 2026 regular meeting was scheduled to address several significant action items including the 2026-27 budget reconciliation plan, teacher contract approvals, and a wage increase of 2.63% for non-teaching staff. The board was also expected to consider renewal of the WAMCS charter school contract for 2026-2031 and enter closed session regarding personnel matters including non-renewal notices and contract evaluations.

discussions.body: Maine Elementary was scheduled to be recognized during the Excellence in Action presentation portion of the meeting. No additional details were provided in the agenda materials.

Elizabeth Channel, Assistant Superintendent of Operations, was scheduled to present a written summary report of legal counsel expenses incurred during the third quarter of 2025-2026, with an estimated presentation time of 2 minutes. The report was described as broken down by law firm and by type of legal advice sought, requiring no action from the board.

Elizabeth Channel, Assistant Superintendent of Operations, was expected to present the budget reconciliation plan for budgeting purposes, with an estimated 3 minutes for presentation. This item was previously discussed at the April Committee of the Whole meeting and was scheduled for board action.

Tabatha Gundrum was scheduled to present a list of teacher contracts for approval for the 2026-27 school year, with an estimated presentation time of 5 minutes. The board was expected to take action on these contract approvals.

Tabatha Gundrum was scheduled to present a recommended wage adjustment of 2.63% for all employee groups in the District except teachers, with an estimated 5 minutes for presentation. The agenda noted that teacher negotiations would commence soon with separate action at a later date.

The board was expected to consider the 2026-2031 WAMCS charter contract renewal, with an estimated 2 minutes for presentation. Elizabeth Channel, identified as WAMCS Head of School, had presented the contract at the April Committee of the Whole meeting.

The board was scheduled to enter closed session pursuant to state statutes to discuss final notice of non-renewal under section 19.85(1)(c) and contract evaluation under sections 19.85(1)(e)(g), with potential action to follow upon reconvening in open session.

publicComment: A public and student comment period was included on the agenda as item VI.
actionItems: Board was expected to vote on approval of the Consent Agenda including appointments, separations, leaves of absence, retirements, meeting minutes, payment of bills/budget status, and donations
Action was requested for the 2026-27 Budget Reconciliation Plan
Action was requested for 2026-27 Teacher Contract Approvals
Action was requested for Various Group Wage/Salary Increase of 2.63% for non-teaching staff
Action was requested for WAMCS Charter School Contract Renewal for 2026-2031
Board was expected to potentially take action following closed session regarding non-renewal notices and contract evaluations
title: Regular Meeting - 2026-05-11
